# SCORE Leadership and Management

Last reviewed for BOSS Library ingestion: 2026-06-21

## BOSS Library tags
score, manage-grow, mature-operations-and-growth

## Resource purpose
Leadership and management education.

## How the BOSS AI Librarian should use this resource
Use when the owner is transitioning from doing the work to managing people, systems, or managers.

## Best-fit BOSS lifecycle stage
Mature Operations and Growth

## Route the user here when
The user asks about delegation, leadership, management, culture, accountability, or scaling beyond owner-run operations.

## BOSS routing notes
- Fits BOSS Growth and owner-run to manager-run transition.
